The GIS layer indicates the presence of plantations within the proposed scheme area. However, the GIS system appears to have misinterpreted naturally occurring light bushes as plantation cover. Upon evaluation, the scheme may be considered technically feasible based on parameters such as catchment characteristics and command area.
 It is important to note that naturally growing bushes do not fall under the category of social forestry. Supporting documentary evidence, including geo-tagged photographs of the area where the construction of the proposed Water Detention Structure (WDS) is planned, has been annexed for reference.
 In view of the above, the scheme may be considered for approval."
